LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CCSF'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: CONTEMPT AS ORDERED BY THE COURT.(PER EX PARTE ORDER OF 04/18/03) DEFENDANT DOES NOT SHOW GOOD CAUSE FOR NON-COMPLIANCE WITH COURT ORDERS RE COURT APPEARANCES AND BUILDING REPAIRS TO 2890-2894 FOLSOM STREET, S.F., CA. THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT ERWIN BERMUDEZ IN CONTEMPT AND REMANDS HIM INTO CUSTODY FOR 5 DAYS. 3 DAYS ARE STAYED. HE IS TO BE RELEASED 8/30/03 AT 10:00AM. IF MR. BERMUDEZ FAILS TO SHOW UP IN COURT AND/OR COMPLY WITH COURT ORDERS, THE COURT WILL REMAND DEFENDANT INTO CUSTODY TO SERVE THE REMAINDER OF THE 5 DAY SENTENCE. SARGEANT M. PONI TOOK THE DEFENDANT INTO CUSTODY. CONTEMPT ORDER PREPARED AND SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. CSR BELDON YEE, #2647 (302/REQ/RS)
